parsed.production_notes: The presenter exhibits uncanny facial movements and slightly unnatural lip-sync. The lighting and skin texture have a synthetic, overly smooth quality typical of AI avatars.

characters.appearance: Young adult woman of South Asian descent. Slim build, medium complexion. Dark brown, straight hair parted in the middle. Distinctive sharp nose and expressive eyes.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, confident, and directly engaging with the viewer.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, teal wall, desk, microphone, lamp, framed picture.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit room with teal walls. She faces the camera, holding a smartphone in her left hand. A black microphone on an articulated arm is positioned in front of her on the left. Behind her, slightly out of focus, is a black desk lamp with a warm light and a small framed picture on the wall. She wears a brown collared shirt and speaks directly to the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter introduces the app while sitting at her desk. Various app UI elements overlay the video, showing a speech scan in progress, her initial score of 75%, and a practice screen where she says 'Goofy moves'. Large text captions appear over her chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I thought my English was pretty good until I found this app that showed me otherwise.
Character A says: A few months ago, I came across BoldVoice's SpeechScan.
Character A says: The first time I took the test, I came in at 75%.
Character A says: Goofy moves.
scenes.on_screen_text: I THOUGHT MY ENGLISH WAS PRETTY GOOD UNTIL I FOUND THIS APP THAT SHOWED ME OTHERWISE. A FEW MONTHS AGO I CAME ACROSS BOLDVOICE'S SPEECHSCAN. THE FIRST TIME I TOOK THE TEST I CAME IN AT 75%. Goofy moves. 79% Grading your intonation... 96% Grading your fluency... 100% SpeechScan Your Speech Level Maya 75% Native Proficient Advanced Intermediate Beginner Novice Practice My Text Coach Alice Let's begin! Record yourself saying the phrase below. Goofy moves 82% Goofy moves 68% moves M.OO.V.Z M 90% Awesome! OO 90% Awesome! V 0% You missed this sound Watch Sound Z 90% Awesome!

scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, teal wall, desk, microphone, lamp, framed picture.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit room with teal walls. She faces the camera, holding a smartphone in her left hand. A black microphone on an articulated arm is positioned in front of her on the left. Behind her, slightly out of focus, is a black desk lamp with a warm light and a small framed picture on the wall. She wears a brown collared shirt and speaks directly to the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter continues speaking at her desk. App UI overlays display detailed feedback on pronunciation, intonation, and fluency, including a triangle chart and specific word stress corrections. Large text captions continue to appear.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I never realized what I was doing wrong.
Character A says: Then the app showed me the areas where I could improve, and I've been practicing every single night for like 10 minutes before bed.
Character A says: Today, I'm taking another SpeechScan and we'll see how I do.
scenes.on_screen_text: I NEVER REALIZED WHAT I WAS DOING WRONG. THEN THE APP SHOWED ME THE AREAS WHERE I COULD IMPROVE AND I'VE BEEN PRACTICING EVERY SINGLE NIGHT FOR LIKE 10 MINUTES BEFORE BED. TODAY I'M TAKING ANOTHER SPEECHSCAN AND WE'LL SEE HOW I DO. Pronunciation 67 Good Intonation 93 Advanced Fluency 83 Great Fluency 83 Great Your fluency is solid. We spotted 2 words where you're stressing the wrong syllable, and you tend to speak slower than native speakers. We'll work on both. Word stress We found 2 words where you're stressing the wrong syllable. Intonation patterns to improve Compare how your intonation rises or falls differently from the coach's. flo-wers 80% From "She's super thankful for the beautiful birthday flowers" Coach You

scenes.scene_label: Second Test and Call to Action
scenes.setting: Dimly lit room, teal wall, desk, microphone, lamp, framed picture.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman sits at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit room with teal walls. She faces the camera, holding a smartphone in her left hand. A black microphone on an articulated arm is positioned in front of her on the left. Behind her, slightly out of focus, is a black desk lamp with a warm light and a small framed picture on the wall. She wears a brown collared shirt and speaks directly to the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter takes another test. App UI overlays show her practicing words like 'enthusiasm' and 'future', followed by her new score of 91%. The BoldVoice logo appears in the top left corner as she delivers the final call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Enthusiasm.
Character A says: Future.
Character A says: 91%!
Character A says: Try BoldVoice for free to see what you get on your SpeechScan.
scenes.on_screen_text: ENTHUSIASM. FUTURE. 91%! TRY BOLDVOICE FOR FREE TO SEE WHAT YOU GET ON YOUR SPEECHSCAN. Practice My Text Coach Alice Great job! Let's keep going! enthusiasm 99% enthusiasm IH.N th.OO Z.EE AA Z.uh.M Practice My Text Coach Alice Nailed it! Let's move on. future 99% future F.Y.OO CH.ER Your Speech Level Maya 91% Native Proficient Advanced Intermediate Beginner Novice BoldVoice 97% Grading your fluency... 100% SpeechScan
